name: TN Quick Cash Lebanon
description_short: Tennessee Quick Cash Lebanon offers title loans, flex lines of credit, and check cashing with same-day funding up to $6,500. Located in Lebanon, TN with instant approval and no prepayment penalties.
description_long:
Tennessee Quick Cash is a regional cash advance lender operating in Middle Tennessee with a physical location in Lebanon. The company specializes in fast-turnaround emergency financing solutions designed for consumers who need cash immediately. Their Lebanon store is located at 408 S Cumberland St. Suite A and operates Monday-Thursday 8am-7pm, Friday 8am-8pm, and Saturday 9am-5pm, with phone support at (615) 453-7980.

The company offers three primary services: Title Loans (30-day cash loans using vehicle title as collateral with no prepayment penalties), Flex Loans (unsecured lines of credit with no annual or penalty fees, drawing only on amounts used), and Check Cashing services (including payroll, government, tax, and business checks at 2% fee, plus money orders). They advertise loans up to $6,500 with same-day or instant funding, and claim a 5-minute application process with quick approval.

Tennessee Quick Cash differentiates itself through transparent vehicle loan estimates (offered free at their locations), flexible borrowing terms on Flex Loans with no annual fees, and a low check-cashing rate of 2% for payroll checks. They offer online account access and email statements for Flex Loans 14 days before due date. The company complies with Tennessee state regulations, including mandatory 5% principal reductions on title loan renewals starting at the third payment.

As an emergency lender, Tennessee Quick Cash serves consumers facing immediate cash needs but operates in a high-cost lending category. Title loans carry implicit costs through renewal fees and principal reductions. The company does not disclose APR rates, loan terms beyond 30 days for titles, or Flex Loan rates on their website, making full cost comparison difficult before application. This remains an option for consumers with vehicles or checking accounts who cannot access traditional credit.
address: 408 S Cumberland St Suite A, Lebanon, TN 37087

company_info.headquarters: 408 S Cumberland St Suite A, Lebanon, TN 37087

pros: No prepayment penalties on title loans — customers can repay early without additional charges
Flex Loans carry no annual fees, penalty fees, or application charges
Low check-cashing rate of 2% for payroll checks (industry average is 3-5%)
Free vehicle value estimates in-store before committing to title loans
Same-day or instant funding advertised; 5-minute online application process
Extended weekend hours (open Saturday 9am-5pm; Friday until 8pm)
Online account access and email statements for Flex Loans with 14-day payment notice
cons: APR rates and full Flex Loan terms not disclosed on website — cost transparency lacking before application
Title loans require vehicle title as collateral with mandatory 30-day renewal cycles
Tennessee state law requires 5% principal reduction starting at 3rd title loan renewal, increasing long-term costs
Website does not specify maximum Flex Loan amounts or credit limit eligibility criteria
No mention of credit counseling, financial education, or alternatives to high-cost borrowing
best_for: Vehicle owners with emergency cash needs who can use title as collateral and repay within 30 days
Gig workers and contractors needing quick check-cashing services with low per-check fees
Borrowers seeking flexible credit access without annual fees (Flex Loan customers)
Consumers in Middle Tennessee without access to traditional banks or payday loan alternatives
diagnosis: Tennessee Quick Cash Lebanon is best suited for vehicle owners or check-cashing customers in Middle Tennessee facing genuine emergency cash needs within 30 days. The primary caveat is that title loans and Flex Loans are high-cost credit products without transparent APR disclosure, and title loans create renewal cycles with escalating costs per Tennessee law—borrowers should explore traditional bank loans, credit union emergency loans, or employer advances first.
services: Title loans up to $6,500 with 30-day terms and vehicle collateral
Flex Loans — revolving lines of credit with no annual or penalty fees
Same-day and instant funding for qualified applicants
Online account access and statements for Flex Loans
